message:
fix: BEADS_TEST_MODE blocks production port even when BEADS_DOLT_PORT set

When Gas Town's beads module injects BEADS_DOLT_PORT=3307 from
metadata.json, the test mode guard was bypassed because BEADS_DOLT_PORT
took unconditional priority. This caused testdb_* databases to leak
onto production (247 DBs in under 2 minutes during polecat test runs).

Now applyConfigDefaults resolves port from env/config first, then
applies the test mode guard as a separate pass. If BEADS_TEST_MODE=1
and the resolved port is the production port (3307), it forces port 1
regardless of source. Only non-production BEADS_DOLT_PORT values
(actual test server ports) override test mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
